2 min read
Just now

--

When I joined the Tamil Nadu State Transport Corporation (TNSTC) as an Assistant Engineer, I never imagined that one day I would start my own web and software development company.
Like many fresh graduates, I wanted to build a successful career in technology. Working at TNSTC taught me valuable lessons about discipline, responsibility, teamwork, and solving real-world problems. Those experiences became the foundation for my next chapter.
Outside of work, I spent countless hours learning modern technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Firebase, SQL, Python, Power BI, and Git. Every project I built improved my skills and gave me more confidence.
As my experience grew, I realized I wanted to create digital solutions for businesses rather than just work on technical tasks. That vision led me to establish SR Site Studio, a web and software development company focused on helping businesses build a strong digital presence.
Today, SR Site Studio provides services such as:

• Website Development

• Web Application Development

• E-commerce Solutions

• UI/UX Design

• Website Redesign

• SEO-Friendly Business Websites

• Website Performance Optimization

• Custom Software Solutions
This article is the beginning of my journey. Through this blog, I’ll share what I learn about web development, software engineering, data analytics, entrepreneurship, and the challenges of building a technology company from the ground up.
If you’re a student, recent graduate, or someone planning to start your own tech business, I hope my experiences help you on your own journey.
Welcome to the first chapter of my story.
